title: Vanilla Reimagined+
description: A reimagined version of Minecraft, with aesthetic details without losing the vanilla essence, giving a new gaming experience.
body:
![Vanilla Reimagined+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/deedbc48024dc89a9c4b863d8ffe663185f26eba.png)

✨Vanilla Reimagined is a modpack that lets you enjoy the classic Minecraft experience with enhanced visuals that make it look better without losing its core gameplay. It provides a great overall gaming experience.

✨Featuring [Hold my Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) as the main mod, combined with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) textures to provide an enhanced visual experience, and also including a profile that allows compatibility with [Resprited](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/resprited_infernalizard) textures.

## ✨Main features
- 🏜️Environmental colors depending on the biome
- ⛏️3D items!
- 💧New visual effects
- 🏃‍♂️‍➡️New animations
- 📱Profiles with vanilla textures or [Resprited](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/resprited_infernalizard) textures
